sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109390" key="u(potraxh/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτρᾰχήλ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n109390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the back just below the neck,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.136</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n109390.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">neck of a column,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3.12</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
